description_long: This nightstand features a minimalist, boxy design with a smooth, dark exterior finish. It stands on four straight, narrow legs that elevate the main body above the ground, giving it a modern and functional appearance. The front face displays a single, flush drawer with no visible handle, contributing to its sleek and understated look. The top surface is flat and suitable for supporting small items such as lamps, books, or personal belongings. The overall construction suggests a sturdy build, likely made from engineered wood or metal, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. There are no visible decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian and contemporary style.
description: A modern, boxy nightstand with a dark, smooth finish, single flush drawer, and four straight legs. Its minimalist design is functional and sleek.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flush drawer and the straight legs beneath the main body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the nightstand and the continuous, unadorned side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless back and the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side panel and leg structure.
